title: Text Simplification
scenario: Simplify a passage of text on a complex topic such as quantum physics. The output should be a rewritten version of the passage in simpler language, using 10-12 words per sentence, and avoiding technical jargon.

evaluationCriteria.description: Verify if the rewritten passage has a word count similar to the original passage.
Check if the rewritten passage uses simpler language.
Verify if the rewritten passage avoids technical jargon.
